nasb.text: Now for the rest of the sons of Levi: of the sons of Amram, Shubael; of the sons of Shubael, Jehdeiah.

esv.text: And of the rest of the sons of Levi: of the sons of Amram, Shubael; of the sons of Shubael, Jehdeiah.

cnv.text: 利未還有其他子孫：暗蘭的子孫中有書巴業；書巴業的子孫中有耶希底亞。

ccb.text: 其他的利未人还有暗兰的后代书巴业，书巴业的后裔耶希底亚，
